reviews.review_description: Hello again. So, the developer is actually a really nice guy. You describe a problem, and he actually responds to it and patches it—and in no time at all, practically overnight. That’s absolutely awesome. I also have another interesting idea that might be pretty exciting: imagine playing the game outside in your garden or something, and being able to control the helicopters in 1:1 scale mode (meaning they appear right in front of you at their actual, full size). That feeling—seeing a massive helicopter flying toward you from a distance on its final approach, landing right under your nose in the garden—and being able to control it yourself? That would be incredible.

developer_response.body:
I experimented with this in ARwolf, which is free on my website: https://vroom.space/arwolf/

The flight physics were complicated and still have problems.  I’d hope to fix them and add the functionality to AR Choppers,  but it is a large undertaking!

reviews.review_title: It dosnt get better then this for mixed
reviews.review_description: This is by far my favorite app for mixed reality the developer is always improving the quality and detail of the Helicopters. Seriously amazing detail and just fun to watch them hover in front of you. Thank you!! Great work

developer_response.body: It's my favorite too, but I'm biased. ;)  Thanks again for taking the time to post a review!

reviews.review_description:
Full scale models you can walk around, best played outside. Brilliant level of detail.

The developer is constantly tweaking the games, making them better each time. 

If you get this and like it, definitely look at AR Planes too!

THIS is what VR can do! Having heli's flying around my room in vr is such an amazing experience. It runs perfect and looks crazy good. Plus the developer is always updating. How this isn't popular makes no sense. Definitely worth it at this price.

Between this game and the sister game with planes are just another reason the Q3 is still the king of the VR headsets. 

Great job developers.  Can you next game be with tanks?  That would be awesome.

reviews.review_title: Not as good as AR Planes
reviews.review_description:
At first i was little disappointed after AR planes, the flight model seemed little too restricted, but after consulting developer, he really liked my ideas how to improve the game, without taking anything away from anyone. Now after the newest update, the game feels completely new and excites the inner child in me. Im very happy to see game is being developed actively, and not sold as abandonware. 

I started to follow developer, since he really seems to know the "niche" categories, im really after in AR / VR. Cannot wait what he comes up next!
You know a game's good when you just keep grinning when playing it. I love the variety of copters. I especially  love the Chinook!! Developer, whoever you are, thanks for the entertainment.

developer_response.body: I'm glad you like it!  Thanks for the review! :)

reviews.review_title: Top Fun Pilots we are with these games
reviews.review_description: As I said with AR Planes (the other amazing game by this developer) for me this is what VR and especially the Mixed Reality or Augmented Reality was made for. Absolute cut above the rest and I dare anyone to put down the controllers once you start. It's engaging, fun, tricky sometimes, takes skill but also easily learned by putting in some time. I can highly recommend this and AR Planes....c'mon choppers and jets...you can't have one and not the other hehe. Especially if you're an aviation nut...Top Fun Pilot. Signing out.

reviews.review_title: Chopper Ar Awesome Recommend this Game
reviews.review_description: Beautiful Detail models of Helicopters 🚁 to play  in Ar its Amazing I also bought Planes Ar good to play around with when your just lazy sitting on your lounge chilling Out  Recommend this Game it's  Awesome 👍

Well worth the money. Super realistic helicopters. The only thing I wished was that you could make the helicopters and planes bigger in the first app so they were easier to fly. Now they're scale models.

Very very nice relax game, thanks for developer, pls missing me a airwolf and mi24 with funkcion retracts gears
.

developer_response.body:
I wanted to include Airwolf but couldn't for legal reasons, so I made it available for sideload on my website: https://vroom.space/arwolf/

I plan to add retractable gear to all choppers that support it in a future update!

reviews.review_description: This is a very nice helicopter game and experiance. Highly recommended.  Beautiful models and good control feeling. Would be nice to be able to fly around with the full scale mode enabled. Option to connect external controller like a RC controller would make this stunning app even better.  Cant stop flying.

Best $8 I have spent in a long time.

Very easy controls too.

I’ve been waiting on this so long!! Amazing detail, nice fly mechanics although I wish there was an option to use the controls like a real RC helicopter. This is absolutely amazing. If you’re a Heli head then don’t even hesitate buy this IMMEDIATELY!! Kudos to the developers!! Awesome work!!  ￼I hope in the future they develop more for it.

developer_response.body: I added collective to the left thumbstick in yesterday's update.  I hope that makes it even better for you!  :)
